---
title: "Getting Started"
---

Welcome to joshpy! This section will help you get up and running quickly.

## Installation

See [Installation](installation.qmd) for detailed instructions on installing joshpy
and its optional dependencies.

## Quickstart

The [Quickstart](quickstart.qmd) guide walks through running your first parameter
sweep in under 5 minutes.

## Next Steps

After completing the quickstart:

1. Read [Architecture](../architecture.qmd) to understand how joshpy's abstractions fit together
2. Follow [Single Run & Iteration](../tutorials/manual-workflow.qmd) for the daily research workflow
3. Try [SweepManager](../tutorials/sweep-manager.qmd) for systematic parameter sweeps
4. See [Analysis & Visualization](../tutorials/analysis.qmd) to explore results
